correction_summary.problem: Planning-only run was marked as 'completed', blocking real actionable daily run
correction_summary.fix: Lock schema now distinguishes run types. Only actionable_daily_run with growth actions qualifies as daily completion.
correction_summary.reclassified_previous_run: run-20260605-201502 reclassified from 'completed' to 'planning_only' — does NOT qualify

task2_gateway_trigger_update.new_logic: Only actionable_daily_run with qualifies_as_daily_completion=true counts as 'completed today'. Planning/dry/status runs trigger EXECUTE_ACTIONABLE_RUN.
task2_gateway_trigger_update.test_result: After planning run reclassification, trigger correctly returned EXECUTE_ACTIONABLE_RUN

task3_cron_backup_update.new_behavior: Step 0 checks lock for actionable_daily_run. SKIP only if actionable completed. EXECUTE if only planning/dry/status.

task4_manual_trigger_update.new_behavior: --status-only shows run history with qualification status. EXECUTE if no actionable run today.

tomorrow_gateway_behavior: If Gateway restarts, trigger will SKIP (actionable run already completed today for Jun 5). On Jun 6, trigger will EXECUTE_ACTIONABLE_RUN (no runs for new day).
